'''barate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wordplayfully|wordplayfully]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-r-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wordplayfully|wordplayfully]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| barate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:barate|barate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:baratesher|baratesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:baratesherĂ«m|baratesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:baratero|baratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:barateshĂ«|barateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:barateshĂ«m|barateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibaratero|gokibaratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibarateshĂ«|gokibarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibarateshĂ«m|gokibarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobarankerom|gobarankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobarankeshĂ«|gobarankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobarankeshĂ«m|gobarankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobarankeya|gobarankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:baraterom|baraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:baratemu|baratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:barateya|barateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibaraterom|gokibaraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibaratemu|gokibaratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibarateya|gokibarateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:bararate|bararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bararatesher|bararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bararatesherĂ«m|bararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bararatero|bararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bararateshĂ«|bararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bararateshĂ«m|bararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibararatero|gokibararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibararateshĂ«|gokibararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibararateshĂ«m|gokibararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobararankerom|gobararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobararankeshĂ«|gobararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobararankeshĂ«m|gobararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobararankeya|gobararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bararaterom|bararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bararatemu|bararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bararateya|bararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibararaterom|gokibararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibararatemu|gokibararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibararateya|gokibararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:bĂŠrĂŠte|bĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bĂŠrĂŠtesher|bĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|bĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠrĂŠtero|bĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|bĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|bĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠrĂŠtero|gokibĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokibĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokibĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobĂŠrĂŠnkerom|gobĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|gobĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gobĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobĂŠrĂŠnkeya|gobĂŠrĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠrĂŠterom|bĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠrĂŠtemu|bĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bĂŠrĂŠteya|bĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠrĂŠterom|gokibĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokibĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibĂŠrĂŠteya|gokibĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:bafrafte|bafrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bafraftesher|bafraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafraftesherĂ«m|bafraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafraftero|bafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bafrafteshĂ«|bafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafrafteshĂ«m|bafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafraftero|gokibafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibafrafteshĂ«|gokibafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafrafteshĂ«m|gokibafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobafrafnkerom|gobafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobafrafnkeshĂ«|gobafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobafrafnkeshĂ«m|gobafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobafrafnkeya|gobafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafrafterom|bafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafraftemu|bafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bafrafteya|bafrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafrafterom|gokibafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafraftemu|gokibafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibafrafteya|gokibafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
